name: First-Aid Hose Reel Drum
shortDescription: Swinging-arm hose reel for immediate first-aid firefighting.
longDescription: A first-aid hose reel gives untrained occupants a controllable water supply within seconds of discovering a fire, without needing to run out a full delivery hose. Fabricated in MS with an epoxy red finish and a swinging arm so the reel can be pulled clear of the wall and directed at the fire.

images.alt: First-Aid Hose Reel Drum supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
